title: Credit Risk Analyst (all genders)
description:
Credit Risk Analyst – Europe (all genders)

German Speaking




📍 Location: Berlin | Hybrid (2 days office / 3 days remote)

💰 Competitive salary + excellent benefits




Ready to make an impact in global finance?




Join Westcon Comstor, a global leader in IT distribution, and help shape financial strategy across high-growth European markets.

We’re looking for a German-speaking Credit Risk Analyst to manage trade credit risk, ensure compliance, and protect our financial health. This role blends financial analysis, risk assessment, and stakeholder engagement – perfect for someone who thrives on detail and collaboration.




Your Responsibilities:

Assess and manage credit risk across Europe.
Review financial statements and maintain credit facilities.
Support collections and insurance compliance.
Deliver insightful reporting and analysis.




What We Need:

Business fluency in German and English.
CICM qualification or degree in a numerate discipline.
Strong credit risk experience in a multinational environment.
Advanced Excel and reporting skills.




Our Benefits:

30 days vacation and up to 30 days workation per year.
Regular company events: We live team spirit!
On-the-job training and extensive development opportunities.
JobRad leasing: Mobility reimagined.
Company pension plan and numerous discounts via “Corporate Benefits”.
Stay fit and healthy: Access to thousands of gyms as well as wellness and mental well-being apps.
Germany ticket subsidy for relaxed and affordable travel.




What we offer:

🌍 An inclusive and supportive work environment where diversity is celebrated.
📈 Opportunities for professional growth, learning, and career development.
💻 Flexible working arrangements, health insurance, and other benefits to support your wellbeing.
🤝 A culture of collaboration, innovation, and accountability.




Commitment to diversity & inclusion:

We are an equal opportunity employer and value diversity in our workforce. We welcome applications from individuals of all backgrounds, regardless of race, ethnicity, gender, age, disability, sexual orientation, or any other protected characteristic. Equity is at the heart of all our departments and roles.

If you need reasonable adjustments during the recruitment process, please let us know.




📄 Please submit your CV in English to ensure consistency in our review process.




To recruitment agencies: 

Only agencies engaged by Westcon-Comstor are authorised to support our recruitment. CVs or profiles sent with Notice out a prior agreement will be considered unsolicited, and no fees will be paid. Thank you for your understanding.




Join us and be part of a team that’s shaping the future of technology across the channel.
